narrative:
Precinct Center Twp North (precinct in Columbiana County) has 1,301 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.8 percentage points.
